---
title: "Where Quasi-Monte Carlo Theory and Practice Meet"
author: "Fred J. Hickernell"
subtitle: |
  Illinois Institute of Technology, hickernell@illinoistech.edu

  Joint work with several collaborators and the <span class="pkg">qmcpy</span> development team

  Supported in part by NSF-DMS-2316011 &nbsp; &nbsp;  ·  &nbsp; &nbsp; Thanks to the organizers

  Monte Carlo and Quasi-Monte Carlo Methods 2026 (MCQMC26), Edinburgh

  🔗 Slides: fjhickernell.github.io/MCQMC26/slides/MCQMC26.html

date: 2026-06-08
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"

metadata-files:
  - ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/research/research-slides.yml

execute:
  echo: false

format:
  revealjs:
    code-overflow: wrap
    footer: |
      Fred J. Hickernell · Illinois Institute of Technology · assisted by ChatGPT

---


# Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) Has Grown Over Several Decades

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Motivates and illustrates theory 
  - Solves real problems

&nbsp;

* [Theory]{.alert} justifies and explains practice

&nbsp;


&nbsp;


* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font-scale: 0.75;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>

:::

:::

:::

## No QMC with roots only

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

&nbsp;


&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

* [Foundation]{.alert} enables theory

  - Rooted in multiple disciplines 
  - Rare for a single person to have expertise in all of them

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-only-root"></div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-example-label algebra">Algebra</div>
<div class="tree-example-label analysis">Analysis</div>
<div class="tree-example-label cs">Computer<br>Science</div>
<div class="tree-example-label domain">Domain<br>Knowledge</div>
<div class="tree-example-label statistics">Statistics</div>

:::

:::

:::


## A strong trunk supports the canopy

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;


&nbsp;

* [Theory]{.alert} 

  - Draws on the foundation
  
  - Explains what may and may not work

  - Grows in response to suprises in practice

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font-scale: 0.75;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-mask-canopy"></div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-example-label sequence">Sequence<br>Construction</div>
<div class="tree-example-label error">Error<br>Bounds</div>
<div class="tree-example-label discrepancy">Discrepancy</div>
<div class="tree-example-label change-measure">Variation<br>Reduction</div>
<div class="tree-example-label ibc">Information-Based<br>Complexity</div>
<div class="tree-example-label multi">Multilevel</div>
<div class="tree-example-label dimension">Effective<br>Dimension</div>
<div class="tree-example-label prob">Probabilistic<br>Numerics</div>

:::

:::

:::


## Canopy is the most visible

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Solving problems with societal impact
  - Infrastructure for practitioners
  - Requires theory for justification
  - May not seem to align with theory at first

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font-scale: 0.75;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>
<div class="tree-example-label uq">Uncertainty<br>Quantification</div>
<div class="tree-example-label qf">Quantitative<br>Finance</div>
<div class="tree-example-label software">Software</div>
<div class="tree-example-label community">Collaboration<br>& Community</div>
<div class="tree-example-label cg">Computer<br>Graphics</div>
<div class="tree-example-label data-driven">Data-Driven<br>Error Bounds</div>



:::

:::

:::





# Low Discrepancy Sequence Constructions

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

TBD

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="35%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-example-label sequence">Sequence<br>Construction</div>
<div class="tree-example-label discrepancy">Discrepancy</div>
<div class="tree-example-label missing">Missing<br>Data</div>

:::

:::

:::


# Data-Driven Error Bounds

# Software Development and Dissemination

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import runpy

helper = runpy.run_path("../qmcsoftware/scripts/qmc_software_table.py")

helper["render_qmc_software_table"](
    "../qmcsoftware/data/qmc-software.yml",
    mode="slides",
    start=0,
    stop=10,
)
```

---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import runpy

import runpy

helper = runpy.run_path("../qmcsoftware/scripts/qmc_software_table.py")

helper["render_qmc_software_table"](
    "../qmcsoftware/data/qmc-software.yml",
    mode="slides",
    start=10,
    stop=20,
)

```

# Collaboration and Community

## Thanks to many collaborators

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import yaml
from pathlib import Path
people = yaml.safe_load(Path("../data/collaborators.yml").read_text())
ncols = 6
img_width = "135px"
print(f'<div class="collab-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat({ncols}, 1fr);">')
for person in people:
    slug = person["slug"]
    caption = person["caption"]
    img = f"../assets/img/headshots/processed/{slug}.jpg"
    print(f'''
<div class="collab-card">
  <img src="{img}" alt="{caption}" style="width:{img_width};">
  <div class="collab-caption">{caption}</div>
</div>
''')

print("</div>")
```
---

# Future Directions

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}

* [Practice]{.alert}
  - Solving problems with societal impact
  - Infrastructure for practitioners
  - Requires theory for justification
  - May not seem to align with theory at first

:::

::: {.column .tree-col width="65%"}

::: {.tree-slide style="--tree-width: 100%; --tree-font-scale: 0.75;"}
![](../assets/img/qmc-tree.png){.tree-img}
<div class="tree-label practice">Practice</div>
<div class="tree-label theory">Theory</div>
<div class="tree-label foundations">Foundation</div>
<div class="tree-example-label uq">Uncertainty<br>Quantification</div>
<div class="tree-example-label qf">Quantitative<br>Finance</div>
<div class="tree-example-label software">Software</div>
<div class="tree-example-label community">Collaboration<br>& Community</div>
<div class="tree-example-label cg">Computer<br>Graphics</div>
<div class="tree-example-label data-driven">Data-Driven<br>Error Bounds</div>
<div class="tree-example-label sequence">Sequence<br>Construction</div>
<div class="tree-example-label error">Error<br>Bounds</div>
<div class="tree-example-label discrepancy">Discrepancy</div>
<div class="tree-example-label change-measure">Variation<br>Reduction</div>
<div class="tree-example-label ibc">Information-Based<br>Complexity</div>
<div class="tree-example-label prob">Probabilistic<br>Numerics</div>
<div class="tree-example-label multi">Multilevel</div>
<div class="tree-example-label dimension">Effective<br>Dimension</div>
<div class="tree-example-label algebra">Algebra</div>
<div class="tree-example-label analysis">Analysis</div>
<div class="tree-example-label cs">Computer<br>Science</div>
<div class="tree-example-label domain">Domain<br>Knowledge</div>
<div class="tree-example-label statistics">Statistics</div>
<div class="tree-example-label missing">Missing<br>Data</div>
<div class="tree-example-label hpc">High-Performance<br>Computing</div>



:::

:::

:::
